title: Ultimate Magic
description: This mod (will) add an complete and diverse Magic System and other things.
body:
### **IT IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT AND CURRENTLY HAS NO REAL FUNCTIONALITY**
### 
### **EXPECT BUGS**
______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

**Current Features:**

Configurable Aromor Trim Effects.

Some (non functional) Items and Blocks

Custom Recipes

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

**Upcoming Features:**

Ore Generation

A Magic System

A Leveling system (Compatible with Puffish's Skills)

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Added Recipes:
______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
